name_en: Top-tier replica M12257 Rose Red. As a classic design, the Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out medium tote features Monogram canvas and striped fabric in a double-sided design to showcase trendy innovation. Removable shoulder strap for crossbody wear, or convert into a hobo bag via side hooks. Dimensions: 31 × 28 × 14 cm
